MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EMPEROR_STRIKE.title: Strike
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EMPEROR_DEFEND.title: Defend
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EMPERORS_FORESIGHT.des: Reveal every enemy's actions 2, 3, and 4 turns from now.{IfUpgraded:show: Apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.|}
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-TEN_THOUSAND_FUTURES.d: Reveal every enemy's actions 2, 3, and 4 turns from now. At the end of your turn, choose up to 2 cards in your Hand to [gold]Retain[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show: Apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.|}
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EMPERORS_LEGACY.title: The Emperor's Legacy
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EMPERORS_LEGACY.descri: At the end of combat, choose 1 card in your deck and permanently enchant it with [gold]Retain[/gold].
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CONQUEST_DECREE.title: Decree of Conquest
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ABSOLUTE_COMMAND.title: Absolute Command
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EXTERMINATUS.title: Exterminatus
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-WAITING_SPEARSTRIKE.de: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. At the end of each turn this is [gold]Retained[/gold], increase its damage by {RetainIncrease:diff()}.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-INDOMITABLE_GUARD.desc: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. After this is [gold]Retained[/gold] for at least 1 turn, gain {RetainedBlock:diff()} instead.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-PERFECT_MOMENT.title: Perfect Moment
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-PERFECT_MOMENT.descrip: Choose a card in your Hand. It gains [gold]Retain[/gold] and costs 1 less until played.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-PERFECT_MOMENT.selecti: Choose a card to [gold]Retain[/gold] and reduce its cost by 1 until played.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-PRESCIENT_STRIKE.title: Prescient Strike
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-GOLDEN_BLADE.title: Golden Blade
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EMPERORS_BULWARK.title: The Emperor's Bulwark
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-TACTICAL_INSIGHT.title: Angel's Charity
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-TACTICAL_INSIGHT.descr: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Discard 2 cards from your Hand.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-AURAMITE_RAMPART.title: Auramite Rampart
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-PSYCHIC_CONDUIT.title: Psychic Conduit
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-GOLDEN_FORMATION.title: Golden Formation
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-GOLDEN_FORMATION.descr: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Choose 1 card in your Hand to [gold]Retain[/gold] this turn.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-GOLDEN_FORMATION.selec: Choose a card to Retain this turn.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-PRESCIENT_STRIKE.descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the target's action predicted for 2 turns from now is an Attack, apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-PREPLANNED_BULWARK.des: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If any enemy has an Attack predicted for 2 turns from now, gain {NextTurnBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] next turn.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-NARROW_POSSIBILITIES.d: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Put a card from your Hand on top of your Draw Pile.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-NARROW_POSSIBILITIES.s: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-INEVITABLE_VICTORY.des: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Increase it by {ExtraDamage:diff()} for each of the target's actions predicted for 2, 3, or 4 turns from now, up to 3 times.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ARMOUR_OF_ONE_TRUE_KIN: Armour of the One True King
At the end of your turn, choose 1 card to [gold]Retain[/gold]. The first Retained card you play each turn grants {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-GREAT_CRUSADE.title: Great Crusade
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-GREAT_CRUSADE.descript: At the start of your turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Whenever you execute a Decree, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-IMPERIAL_TRUTH.title: Imperial Truth
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-IMPERIAL_TRUTH.descrip: At the start of your turn, if you have no [gold]Artifact[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Artifact[/gold].
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CONDENSED_WRATH.title: Condensed Wrath
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CONDENSED_WRATH.descri: Whenever an Attack is [gold]Retained[/gold] at end of turn, increase that card's damage by {CondensedWrathPower:diff()}.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SHIELD_OF_PATIENCE.des: At turn start, gain {ShieldOfPatiencePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card Retained last turn.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SOVEREIGN_COMMAND.desc: Immediately execute any number of prepared Decrees.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EMPERORS_JUDGMENT.desc: Deal {Damage:diff()} x X damage to ALL enemies.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-MASTER_OF_MANKIND.desc: The first card that costs 2 or more you play each turn draws {Cards:diff()} card. If it is an Attack, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-GOLDEN_THRONE.title: The Golden Throne
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-GOLDEN_THRONE.descript: After your normal draw each turn, choose 1: gain 1 Energy, draw 1 card, or gain 8 [gold]Block[/gold]. You cannot repeat the previous choice. At the end of your turn, heal 4 HP.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-BLESSINGS_OF_CHAOS.des: Choose a Chaos Boon now and after normal draw each turn. Each Boon also grants its permanent Chaos Mark. Each Boon has a maximum level of 2.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-KHORNE_BOON_CHOICE.des: Gain 1 level of Khorne and Wrath. At turn start, gain 8 Vigor per level.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-TZEENTCH_BOON_CHOICE.d: Gain 1 level of Tzeentch and Deception. Draw and temporarily transform up to 1 card per level each turn.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-NURGLE_BOON_CHOICE.des: Gain 1 level of Nurgle and Corruption. Apply Weak and Vulnerable each turn; at level 2, also gain 9 Block.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SLAANESH_BOON_CHOICE.d: Gain 1 level of Slaanesh and Obsession. Increase maximum Hand size by 5; at level 2, gain 1 Energy each turn.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-BOLT_OF_UNIFICATION.de: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the target's action predicted for 2 turns from now is not an Attack, draw {Cards:diff()} card.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-PURGE_THE_UNCLEAN.desc: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the target has a debuff, deal {BonusDamage:diff()} additional damage.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EDICT_OF_ADVANCE.title: Edict of Advance
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-TACTICA_IMPERIALIS.des: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Put a card from your Hand on the bottom of your Draw Pile.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-TACTICA_IMPERIALIS.sel: Choose a card to put on the bottom of your Draw Pile.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-WARD_OF_TERRA.title: Ward of Terra
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-WARD_OF_TERRA.descript: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. If any enemy has an Attack predicted for 2 turns from now, gain {AttackBlock:diff()} instead.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-GUARDIAN_SPEAR.title: Guardian Spear
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-LIGHTNING_CLAW.title: Lightning Claw
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-PSYCHIC_LANCE.title: Psychic Lance
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-PSYCHIC_LANCE.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the target's action predicted for 2 turns from now is not an Attack, gain 1 Energy.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-BANE_OF_THE_TRAITOR.de: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the target's action predicted for 2 turns from now is not an Attack, deal it again.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-BUCEPHELUS_BROADSIDE.d: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. If a Decree is prepared, deal {BonusDamage:diff()} additional damage.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-MOUNT_ARARAT.title: Mount Ararat
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-MOUNT_ARARAT.descripti: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Whenever this is Retained at end of turn, it costs 1 less this combat.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ETERNITY_GATE_COUNTERS: Next turn, after resolving prepared Decrees, immediately repeat the last Decree executed.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SOLAR_REBUKE.title: Solar Rebuke
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EDICT_OF_NIKAEA.title: Edict of Nikaea
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EDICT_OF_NIKAEA.descri: Apply {Power:diff()} Weak and Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SIGILLITES_RECALL.desc: Return 1 card from your Discard Pile to your Hand and give it Retain this turn.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SIGILLITES_RECALL.sele: Choose a card to return to your Hand.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-UNSPOKEN_SANCTION.desc: Exhaust 1 other card in your Hand. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-WEBWAY_FEINT.title: Webway Feint
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-WEBWAY_FEINT.descripti: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. If any enemy has an Attack predicted for 2 turns from now, draw {Cards:diff()} card.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-IMPERIAL_LOGISTICS.des: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. The next card that costs 2 or more costs 1 less.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CALCULATED_SACRIFICE.d: Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP. Gain 1 Energy and draw 1 card.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-FORESEEN_DOOM.title: Foreseen Doom
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-FORESEEN_DOOM.descript: If the target's action predicted for 2 turns from now is an Attack, gain {AttackBlock:diff()} Block. If it is a known non-Attack, draw {Cards:diff()} cards. If it is not predicted, gain {Block:diff()} Block.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-MASTER_CRAFTED_ARSENAL: Give 1 Attack in your Hand Retain and increase its damage by {BonusDamage:diff()} this combat.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-RESERVES_OF_TERRA.desc: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Next turn, gain 1 Energy.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-THE_GOLDEN_PATH.title: The Golden Path
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-THE_GOLDEN_PATH.descri: At turn start, if any enemy has an Attack predicted for 2 turns from now, gain {Block:diff()} Block. Otherwise, if any enemy has an action predicted for 2 turns from now, draw 1 card.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ENDLESS_MANDATE.title: Endless Mandate
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ENDLESS_MANDATE.descri: Whenever a Decree is executed, draw 1 card.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-BANE_OF_HORUS.title: Bane of Horus
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-BANE_OF_HORUS.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the target's action predicted for 2 turns from now is an Attack, deal it again.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-TRIUMPH_AT_ULLANOR.des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times. If this kills an enemy, gain {StrengthPower:diff()} Strength.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ANATHEMAS_TOUCH.title: Anathema's Touch
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ANATHEMAS_TOUCH.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {Power:diff()} Weak and Vulnerable.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-FINAL_DECREE.title: Final Decree
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-FINAL_DECREE.descripti: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, plus {PerDecree:diff()} for every other prepared Decree.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-MALCADORS_SACRIFICE.de: Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP. Gain 2 Energy and draw 3 cards.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-MASTER_THE_WEBWAY.desc: Return up to 3 cards from your Discard Pile to your Hand and give them Retain this turn.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-MASTER_THE_WEBWAY.sele: Choose up to 3 cards to return to your Hand.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-BY_MY_WILL.title: By My Will
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-BY_MY_WILL.description: Give every other card in your Hand Retain and reduce its cost by 1 until played.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-APOTHEOSIS_OF_WAR.desc: Whenever a card is Retained at end of turn, upgrade it for this combat.{IfUpgraded:show: Also upgrade every card in your Hand.|}
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-PERFECT_PRESCIENCE.des: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Cards drawn this way gain Retain this turn.
Remove all debuffs and gain {ArtifactPower:diff()} Artifact.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CALL_THE_LEGIONES.desc: Put up to 2 Attacks from your Draw Pile into your Hand and give them Retain this turn.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CALL_THE_LEGIONES.sele: Choose up to 2 Attacks to put into your Hand.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-THE_ASTRONOMICAN.title: The Astronomican
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-THE_ASTRONOMICAN.descr: At turn start, draw 1 card per card Retained last turn, up to {Cap:diff()}.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-IMPERIAL_MANDATE.title: Imperial Mandate
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-IMPERIAL_MANDATE.descr: Every Decree you prepare is executed immediately.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-PRESCIENCE_INCARNATE.d: At turn start, if any enemy has an Attack predicted for 2 turns from now, gain {Block:diff()} Block. Otherwise, if any enemy has an action predicted for 2 turns from now, gain 1 Energy and draw 1 card.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SANCTUM_IMPERIALIS.des: While Foresight is active, Block is not removed at turn start.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-APOTHEOSIS_OF_MAN.desc: At turn start, gain 1 Strength and Dexterity.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-THE_LAST_CHURCH.title: The Last Church
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-THE_LAST_CHURCH.descri: Gain 1 Artifact. The first time you gain Artifact each turn, draw 1 card.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-WAR_IN_THE_WEBWAY.desc: Whenever a Decree is executed, gain 1 Energy and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-MACHINE_GODS_REVELATIO: The first time you play a card costing 2 or more each turn, gain 1 Energy.
